what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-source image asset named capital-raise/p-02 and labels it as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares an image/jpeg blob with zero width and height.
The file path and id place it under the design-source channel for a capital-raise asset.
The body states it is 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-02.jpg'.
standouts: Explicitly tagged as design ground-truth source material.
Dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image.
concerns: Width and height are both 0, which may indicate missing or uncomputed image dimensions.
The links array is empty, so no explicit relationships to other ledger entries are declared.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, and provenance fields.
Follows the ledger naming pattern image__<channel>_<path>.md.
References the underlying asset via blob URI and a human-readable filename.
notes: A ledger stub for a capital-raise design image that marks itself as source ground-truth but lacks resolved dimensions and outbound links.
questions: Is the blob URI resolvable and does it match the named jpg file?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design-source image asset; it does so, but the zero dimensions suggest the metadata is incomplete rather than fully descriptive.
intention_signals: To create a neutral, addressable record of a source design image so it can be referenced as ground truth in a fused system.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable ledger entry and blob pointer for a design-source image, including source attribution and creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata file for the design-source image capital-raise/p-02.jpg, tagged as source design ground-truth with a blob pointer and zero recorded dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve a source design image asset for later reference or fusion.
